owner_operator_stated: Site does not name an individual owner; it is branded and operated as 'Exquisite Smiles Oak Park,' part of the Smile Brands support organization (600+ offices, 29 states). No mention of Reynolds or Incardona anywhere on the corroborated site.
notes: Record entity REYNOLDS-INCARDONA LTD. (Dr. Harry R. Reynolds, per NPI directories) sits at 1515 N Harlem Ave Suite 108 with phone (708) 445-0800 -- a different suite/phone than this record's Suite #200 / (708) 848-2853. That exact address+phone now belongs to Exquisite Smiles Oak Park, a Smile Brands DSO-affiliated office with 3 associate dentists and active job postings for a General Dentist and Dental Hygienist at this location. Treated as successor/ownership_conflict, not the named entity.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Ross Fraser, DDS is the practice owner; site frames the practice around him personally (graduated University of Illinois College of Dentistry, 2000; solo practice since founding).
notes: Solo independent practice, address (7627 W Lake St Suite 200) and phone (708-366-6001) match exactly. No multi-location/DSO affiliation found. No careers/hiring page present on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Record entity is JOHN J BRESCIA DDS, PC, but this address (7411 Lake St Ste L100, River Forest, IL 60305) and exact phone (708-771-0600) now belong to Catrambone Dental Associates, PC (Dr. Frank Catrambone, DDS), per matching BBB, Yelp, Healthgrades and CareCredit listings. Dr. Brescia's own current NPI/directory listings show a different phone (708-366-0424) at the same building, indicating the practice was succeeded/renamed to Catrambone Dental Associates.
notes: Vendor-hint domain catrambonedental.com has been repurposed to an unrelated FIFA World Cup sports-content site -- it is not the practice's site. No live official website found for Catrambone Dental Associates, PC either. This is a name/ownership successor at the same address+phone: the record's named entity (John J Brescia DDS PC) is no longer who answers this phone/address.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Gary Alder, DDS, FAGD, DAAPM founded the practice in 2012 after relocating from Rush University Medical Center; site/postings frame it as his practice, now recruiting an Associate Dentist described as 'Growth-to-Lead' as the founder scales back.
notes: Solo cosmetic/facial-aesthetics-focused GP practice (Dr. Gary Alder), address (404 Lathrop Ave) and phone (708-366-8909) confirmed via indexed search snippets. Direct WebFetch of gfalderdds.com pages returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked), so extraction relied on search-result snippets actually seen, not a fabricated page load. Actively hiring an Associate Dentist framed as a succession/growth-to-lead role -- strong lead for a job-hunting student. No DSO/multi-location affiliation found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Courtney Villari, DDS operates the practice; current site branding is 'Ovation Dental,' a rebrand of the same practice previously known as River Forest Dental Studio (the record's name), same owner, same address.
notes: Address (7700 Madison St, River Forest, IL 60305) matches the record exactly, corroborating the site under the Corroboration Kill Rule; site's listed phone (708-689-0419) differs from the record's (708-366-6760), consistent with a rebrand/renumbering rather than a different owner (same Dr. Villari throughout). No careers/hiring page found; a /dental-staff-river-forest-il subpage returned 404. Independent single-location practice, no DSO affiliation found.

owner_operator_stated: Multiple business directories (BBB, Yelp, CareCredit, IEMA facility registry) identify the practice at this exact address/phone as 'Kulhanek & Romanek, DDS,' partners Dr. Ladd J. Kulhanek Jr. and Dr. Claudia Romanek -- consistent with the record's provider_count of 2. Could not corroborate via a live practice website.
notes: Vendor-hint domain berwynildentists.com returns HTTP 404 on both the root and the indexed /family-dentists subpage -- no live corroborated website exists. Phone (708-749-3222) and address (6642 Cermak Rd Unit 1, Berwyn, IL 60402) are corroborated across several third-party directories as 'Kulhanek & Romanek, DDS,' but per protocol a directory listing is not a website, so this is treated as no_usable_website. A separate, differently-phone-numbered practice ('Berwyn Family and Pediatric Dentist') also lists this same street address, likely a different suite -- not the phone-matched entity for this record.
